item.guardies_gimmicks.elytra_booster.to: Gives you a boost when flying with your elytra. Choose between three different modes (Crouch + Right Click to change)
item.guardies_gimmicks.experience_jar.to: Stores your experience for later retrieval.
item.guardies_gimmicks.void_bucket.toolt: Destroys any liquid it picks up.
item.guardies_gimmicks.poke_crayon.toolt: Use on a Pokémon to change the color of its nickname. Choose between 13 different colors (Crouch + Right Click to change)
item.guardies_gimmicks.max_hp_up.tooltip: Raises the Pokémon's HP EVs to the maximum
item.guardies_gimmicks.max_iron.tooltip: Raises the Pokémon's Defense EVs to the maximum
item.guardies_gimmicks.max_zinc.tooltip: Raises the Pokémon's Special Defense EVs to the maximum
item.guardies_gimmicks.max_carbos.toolti: Raises the Pokémon's Speed EVs to the maximum
item.guardies_gimmicks.max_protein.toolt: Raises the Pokémon's Attack EVs to the maximum
item.guardies_gimmicks.max_calcium.toolt: Raises the Pokémon's Special Attack EVs to the maximum
